trending_videos.title: Pokémon Champions – Overview Trailer – Nintendo Switch
trending_videos.description:
The Pokémon Champions game launches April 8, 2026 on the Nintendo Switch system. https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/pokemon-champions-switch/

Pokémon battles for everyone! Recruit Pokémon in-game or transfer them from Pokémon HOME, then gear up for thrilling battles with Trainers near and far! Compete in three different modes of Pokémon battles: Ranked Battles, Casual Battles, and Private Battles. You can challenge these modes in both Single Battle and Double Battle formats. Plus, use in-game Victory Points (VP) you’ve earned to improve a Pokémon’s stats, acquire new looks for your Trainer, and more!

The game is also compatible with the Nintendo Switch 2 system. 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.

trending_videos.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
trending_videos.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

trending_videos.title: Dutton Ranch | Official Teaser | Paramount+
trending_videos.description:
Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on a new life in South Texas, but the promise of building a future far from the ghosts of Yellowstone quickly collides with brutal new realities and a rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire.

Dutton Ranch. Streaming May 15. Only on Paramount+.

Like Paramount+ on Facebook: https://bit.ly/PPlusFacebook
Follow Paramount+ on X: https://bit.ly/PPlusOnX
Follow Paramount+ on Instagram: https://bit.ly/PPlusInstagram
Follow Paramount+ on Threads: https://bit.ly/PPlusThreads
Follow Paramount+ on TikTok: https://bit.ly/PPlusTikTok

With Paramount+ you can stream over 40,000 episodes and movies from CBS, BET, Comedy Central, MTV, Nickelodeon, Smithsonian Channel, Paramount Pictures, and SHOWTIME® including exclusive originals, live sports, and news.

Plus, you can count on Paramount+ for the most iconic movies and the latest in live sports and news with your local CBS station, CBS News, CBS Sports HQ, and Mixible.

trending_videos.title: The Furious (2026) Official Trailer - Xie Miao, Joe Taslim
trending_videos.description:
The Furious - Watch the trailer now! In Theaters on May 29. Starring Xie Miao, Joe Taslim, and Yang Enyou. Co-starring Brian Le, Joey Iwanaga, Sahajak Boonthanakit, Manatsanun Phanlerdwongsakul, Guo Junqing, and Winai Wiangyangkung. Special appearances by Yayan Ruhian and Jija Yanin. Directed by Kenji Tanigaki.

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE: YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.lionsgate.com/movies/
https://www.facebook.com/lionsgate
https://twitter.com/lionsgate
https://www.instagram.com/lionsgate/
https://www.tiktok.com/@lionsgate

#TheFurious

After the daughter of Wang Wei (Xie Miao) is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out on a rampage to find her himself. His only ally is Navin (Joe Taslim) – a relentless journalist whose wife has mysteriously disappeared. Fueled by a furious vengeance, the unlikely duo ruthlessly fights against the kidnappers in this explosive mar

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Iowa vs. Florida
trending_videos.description: Iowa faces Florida in the South Region second round at Benchmark International Arena. After a hard-fought battle with the Tigers, Iowa meets the Gators. Florida beat Prairie View 114-55 to qualify. Both teams aim for the tournament's next round.

trending_videos.title: TINY TAKEOVER | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Ready or not, here comes the Tiny Takeover drop! New versions of baby mobs have
stormed Minecraft, causing cuteness overload across biomes and builds. Listen out for
heart-melting sounds, craft name tags for your pets, and keep babies forever young with the
golden dandelion. The babies are officially on the loose, so get ready to collect, coo over,
and create chaos with these tiny rascals!

diverse_content.description: The trending videos showcase diverse content from gaming, news, sports, to movies.
diverse_content.insight: This diversity indicates that audiences are interested in a wide range of topics, suggesting a potential for varied content creation across different sectors.

trailer_dominance.description: Three out of the ten trending videos are movie or game trailers.
trailer_dominance.insight: Trailers consistently draw attention, highlighting their importance in marketing strategies for entertainment industries. Brands should consider leveraging trailers as a key promotional tool.

news_and_current_affairs.description: Two videos from major news networks - FOX News and CNN - are trending.
news_and_current_affairs.insight: News content remains relevant, suggesting opportunities for channels to focus on current issues to engage viewers.

major_brands.description: Top channels include well-known brands like Nintendo, FOX News, and Disney.
major_brands.insight: Established brands have a consistent presence in trending videos, indicating their strong audience base and effective content strategies.

music_influence.description: The presence of a music video (BEDJINE - FOLI RENMEN) indicates the influence of music content.
music_influence.insight: Music continues to be a significant draw for audiences, suggesting creators in this genre should focus on high-quality production and unique offerings.

cross-promotion.description: Opportunities exist for cross-promotional strategies between different content types, such as gaming and entertainment.
cross-promotion.insight: Creators can explore collaborations or partnerships across sectors to tap into diverse audience interests and expand reach.

localized_content.description: The diversity of content types suggests a potential for localized content targeting specific audience interests.
localized_content.insight: Creators can focus on specific cultural or regional content to cater to niche audiences, potentially increasing engagement.

emerging_platforms.description: Platforms like Paramount+ are featured in trending videos, indicating the rise of streaming services.
emerging_platforms.insight: Content creators could explore partnerships with emerging platforms to access new distribution channels and audiences.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
